# RESULTS-M3-RAW — the separation experiment (exact, engine cross-validated)

Null hypothesis H0: M3 is domain-independent at fixed (q,n,k).
Engine asserts hold on every run (incl. sum_phi t2 == C(n,2)(q-1) for ALL domains).

k=2 control q=41 n=8 subgroup vs random_1: EXACTLY EQUAL
k=2 control q=41 n=8 subgroup vs random_2: EXACTLY EQUAL

**H2 verdict: k=2 M3 domain-independent = True**
